summary: The protagonist, a player character, strikes a deal with a powerful dragon named Johannes to receive a quest and equipment upgrades. After negotiating for a high-quality armor set, the player agrees to hunt a 'Furious Drake' to gather the necessary materials. With the dragon providing support and buffs, the player successfully confronts and defeats the boss monster.
key_moments: The protagonist secures a quest from the dragon Johannes.
They negotiate for a custom armor set made from the remains of a powerful boss monster.
The protagonist and Johannes team up to defeat the Furious Drake Carusos.
